name: Bellows Beach
tagline: On a military base, open weekends only — the trade-off is some of the most untouched white sand on the island.
parking: Free lot inside the base gate
bestTime: Saturday morning for the full day; arrive by 9am for best spot
talkStory: BBQ grills and camping with permit — one of the best beach camping spots on Oahu. Gentle shore break great for beginner bodyboarding. The ironwood tree line gives natural shade. Combine with a Waimanalo shave ice run on the way out.
